title: pinus brutia subsp. eldarica
intro: Pinus brutia subsp. eldarica, also known as Eldar Pine, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds, which are derived from its resin, bark, and leaves. The health benefits of Eldar Pine include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting cardiovascular well-being. Herbal preparations of Eldar Pine may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
